content.speakerText: I’m taking this for my allergies. Should I take it with food?
content.speakerTextCn: 我吃这个治过敏，应该饭前吃还是饭后吃？
expectedAnswers: It’s fine to take with or without food — just be consistent.
Take it on an empty stomach for faster absorption.
You can take it after a meal if it upsets your stomach.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回答是否需要随餐服用
语言准确性：使用正确表达如 'on an empty stomach', 'upsets your stomach'
表达自然度：语气自然，符合药剂师或医生的建议口吻
关键词覆盖：包含 'with food', 'without food', 'empty stomach', 'upsets your stomach' 等核心表达

content.scenarioHint: 顾客在药房购买非处方药，想确认药物的主要功效和服用频率
expectedAnswers: How many times a day should I take this?
Can I take it with food?
Is it safe to use if I have high blood pressure?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了药效或用法
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确
表达自然度：符合日常药房对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 medicine, take, dose, for 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 顾客担心药物副作用，想确认是否会影响日常活动如开车或工作
expectedAnswers: Does it affect my ability to drive?
Are there any side effects I should watch out for?
Can I take this during the day without feeling tired?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了对副作用的担忧
语言准确性：使用了正确的副作用相关词汇
表达自然度：符合患者关心安全的口语表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 drowsy, side effects, drive, take 等关键词
